name: Joseph Murtha
blurb: Watertown native with hundreds of military family transactions. #1 agent in Jefferson & Lewis County for most homes sold and volume — 4 years running. Specializes in VA loans, PCS-timeline closings, remote showings, and buy-to-rent investment strategies.
subtitle: North Star Real Estate · Watertown, NY

reviews.quote: Joe hoofed it out there in the snow to get me a good look at multiple houses, while I kicked my feet up enjoying the 75 degree weather with a beer. Truly selfless.
When the snowstorm of the century threatened our closing, Joe went out and shoveled a path to the front door himself and got someone out to plow the driveway.

name: DP Lee
blurb: Experienced agent serving the Fort Drum military community. Details coming soon.

name: VA Loan Specialists
blurb: #1 VA lender in the country. Specializes exclusively in VA loans with dedicated loan teams who understand military timelines, BAH-based purchasing, and PCS deadlines. Free credit consulting included.

name: Home Services
blurb: Local home services for military families — need a contractor? Want cleaner, healthier water? Looking to save on your power bill? Wood Consulting connects you with trusted solutions for your Fort Drum home.

name: Home Services
blurb: Know a trusted home services provider near Fort Drum? We're vetting partners now — snow removal, cleaning, landscaping, HVAC, and more.
